content: Release verification checkpoint after routing polish: final endpoint spacing is re-applied after route repair/simplification so endpoint ports do not collapse before render labels are computed. This resolves the last pattern-sample verification failure around high-degree same-side ports while keeping the edge-label route attachment work intact. Verification: npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts test/layout.test.ts test/edges.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build, npm run verify:pattern-samples, npm test, npm pack --dry-run with tmp npm cache/logs, git diff --check, and browser smoke on a fresh http://127.0.0.1:5173/ tab. Existing untracked reports/ left untouched. Release note: GitHub tag v0.1.1 and npm @archmap/core@0.1.1 already exist, and local main cannot fast-forward onto origin/main; publish the verified work as a new patch version such as 0.1.2 unless the human explicitly accepts public tag/history rewriting.
